game.memory_flip.controls: [↑]/[↓]/[←]/[→] Move Cursor [Space] Flip Card [P] Change Difficulty [D] Quick Jump [S] Save [R] Restart [Q]/[ESC] Exit
game.memory_flip.description: Flip two cards per turn, memorize their positions to match all pairs of patterns.
game.memory_flip.details:
f%Try to flip all pairs of cards open with the fewest steps.

{tc:yellow}Difficulty:{tc:clear}
{tc:#ff7f27}Difficulty 1:{tc:clear} 2 * 2
{tc:#ff7f27}Difficulty 2:{tc:clear} 4 * 4
{tc:#ff7f27}Difficulty 3:{tc:clear} 6 * 6

{tc:yellow}Press P to change difficulty:{tc:clear}
{tc:light_cyan}Difficulty:{tc:clear} 1-3 difficulty

{tc:yellow}Controls:{tc:clear}
{tc:light_cyan}[↑]/[↓]/[←]/[→]{tc:clear} Move cursor
{tc:light_cyan}[Space]{tc:clear} Flip card
{tc:light_cyan}[P]{tc:clear} Change difficulty
{tc:light_cyan}[D]{tc:clear} Quick jump
{tc:light_cyan}[S]{tc:clear} Save
{tc:light_cyan}[R]{tc:clear} Restart
{tc:light_cyan}[Q]/[ESC]{tc:clear} Exit
game.memory_flip.input_jump_hint: Enter 'row col' to jump to coordinates.
game.memory_flip.input_size_hint: Enter difficulty number to change difficulty.
game.memory_flip.name: Memory Flip
warning.back_to_game_list_hint: Press ESC / Q to return to the game list
warning.enlarge_hint: Please enlarge the terminal window to continue.
